<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
            <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #marko-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="marko-logo">
    <title>Marko</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M15.4 5.46h-3.39l-2.3 3.77L7.4 5.46H4l-4 6.55 4 6.53h3.39l-4-6.54L5.7 8.23 8.01 12h3.39l2.31-3.78L16.03 12l-4.01 6.54h3.39l4-6.54zm4.6 0h-3.39l4 6.54-4.01 6.54h3.39L24 12z" />
    </g>
</svg>
